prompt: Run work-do on Task 1 — bd task id is in .work-do-task-ids.json. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox.

assertions.text: Agent ran bd show on the task
Agent recognized Task 1's design is too thin (TBD/empty/insufficient)
Agent did NOT write rotate_secret in src/lib/vault.py (no implementation against missing spec)
Agent did NOT close the task
Output routes to spec-refinement OR explicitly states the task needs more detail
Task left at status: open (not in_progress, since work didn't start) OR notes record the block
